feature.name: Email syntax validation core
feature.description: Extract validate_email with ValidatedEmail normalization and typed EmailNotValidError hierarchy for offline syntax validation without DNS deliverability checks.
included_behaviors: validate_email returns ValidatedEmail with normalized/local_part/domain fields
EmailSyntaxError and EmailNotValidError for invalid addresses
IDNA domain encoding and internationalized local parts (SMTPUTF8)
quoted local part parsing and de-quoting when allowed
display name angle-bracket parsing when allowed
reserved/special-use domain rejection and test_environment bypass
Unicode NFC normalization of local parts

entanglement.description: validate_email orchestrates split_email quoting state, IDNA via idna, RFC length tables, reserved-domain policy, and ValidatedEmail field assembly across syntax/rfc_constants modules.
signals: split_email tracks quote/escape state for display names and quoted locals
validate_email_local_part and validate_email_domain_name share strict/UTF8 flags
SPECIAL_USE_DOMAIN_NAMES and CASE_INSENSITIVE_MAILBOX_NAMES drive post-parse policy
ValidatedEmail aggregates ascii vs Unicode domain/local representations

output.import: import featurelifted; from featurelifted import validate_email, ValidatedEmail, EmailNotValidError, EmailSyntaxError, EmailUndeliverableError
